updates.name: CollectivIQ
updates.description: Multi-model AI consensus platform that queries 10+ LLMs simultaneously (GPT-5.3, Claude Opus, Gemini, etc.), compares outputs, and synthesizes a reliability-weighted answer — reducing hallucinations from 14.2% to 3.8% in benchmarks.

updates.name: Notte Anything API
updates.description: Turns any browser workflow into a production-ready API endpoint. Describe what you need done in a browser, and Notte's agent engineers a callable API — no browser instance needed at runtime. Great for automating sites without public APIs.

updates.name: Krisp Accent Conversion
updates.description: Listener-side real-time accent conversion that clarifies accented English at the phoneme level with <200ms latency. Works bidirectionally — an industry first — across Indian, Filipino, Latin American, African, and Mandarin accents.

updates.name: NOVA
updates.description: AI coding tool that goes beyond suggestions — it writes files from goal descriptions, automatically detects and fixes runtime errors, and refactors code on demand. Aims to eliminate the run-fail-fix-repeat loop.

updates.name: Anima OnBrand Vibe Coding
updates.description: Design-aware AI coding platform that syncs your Figma design system so anyone on the team can vibe-code apps that stay on-brand. IBM-backed, converts Figma designs to production-ready code with AI assistance.

updates.name: Google Pomelli (Photoshoot Update)
updates.description: Google Labs' brand content generator now features AI Photoshoot — transforms ordinary product photos into studio-quality shots using Nano Banana image gen. Analyzes your website to build a 'Business DNA' profile for on-brand marketing assets.

updates.name: Woven
updates.description: AI-powered personal trainer for your relationship, built on attachment theory. Like Duolingo for communication skills — 5-minute daily lessons with guided interactive conversations to build real relationship skills.

updates.name: Personal AI Memory
updates.description: Captures and stores your chat history from various AI platforms (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) so you can build persistent context across sessions and tools. Addresses the fragmented AI memory problem.

updates.name: Gmail Gemini AI Features
updates.description: Major Gmail upgrade powered by Gemini 3 — AI Overviews answer questions about your inbox, Help Me Write drafts emails, smart Suggested Replies, and a new AI Inbox filter that surfaces what matters most.

updates.name: Alibaba Amap AI 3D Tours
updates.description: AI-powered service that lets restaurants create immersive 3D digital showcases by simply uploading standard photos or videos. Built on Alibaba's visual AI model, lowering marketing costs for local businesses.
